html:div.html:p: This library defines decision support logic for the IMMZ.D5.DT.BCG contraindications decision table in the Immunization CPG

html:tr.html:th: Draft Medication Request ID for BCG dose
Bacille Calmette–Guérin (BCG) vaccination is contraindicated Guidance
BCG vaccination could be contraindicated. Clinical judgement is required. Create a clinical note. Case 1
BCG vaccination could be contraindicated. Clinical judgement is required. Create a clinical note. Case 2
BCG vaccination could be contraindicated. Clinical judgement is required. Create a clinical note.
BCG vaccination could be contraindicated. Clinical judgement is required. Create a clinical note. Guidance
